title: Book the Venue
notes: Grand Ballroom at The Rosewood Hotel. Contact: Sarah Johnson, 555-0101. Includes tables, chairs, and basic decor.
extraInfo: Parking for 200 cars included. Setup time from 8am.

title: Hire Catering Service
notes: 3-course dinner for 150 guests. Vegetarian options required. Champagne toast included.

title: Wedding Photography
notes: Full day coverage, 2 photographers. Drone shots of venue. 500 edited photos delivered within 6 weeks.

title: Floral Arrangements
notes: White roses and peonies. Centerpieces for 15 tables, bridal bouquet, 4 bridesmaids bouquets.
extraInfo: Bloom & Blossom Florals - confirm order 2 weeks before.

title: Wedding Cake
notes: 4-tier fondant cake. Vanilla sponge with raspberry filling. Floral sugar decorations.
extraInfo: Sweet Occasions Bakery. Tasting appointment: March 5th.
